# empty_summarised_result { #cdmconnector.empty_summarised_result }

```python
empty_summarised_result(settings=None)
```

Create an empty SummarisedResult.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type                     | Description              | Default   |
|----------|--------------------------|--------------------------|-----------|
| settings | pandas.DataFrame or None | Optional settings table. | `None`    |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | SummarisedResult |               |
